phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket office is
phrases.cultural_note: Pointing is acceptable—just say 'ali' if needed.

likely_response.translation_en: At the main entrance, on the right.

responses.english: At the main entrance, on the right.

phrases.text_local: Onde está o sino do castelo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AW SEE-noo DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo?
phrases.cultural_note: Historic bell symbolizing the city's resilience.

likely_response.local: Pergunte na bilheteira ou ao guia turístico local.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW OW GEEUH too-REESH-tee-koo loo-KAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the ticket office or the local tour guide.

responses.english: Ask at the ticket office or the local tour guide.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW OW GEEUH too-REESH-tee-koo loo-KAHL.
responses.local: Pergunte na bilheteira ou ao guia turístico local.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the keep tower is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Torre de Menagem do Castelo de Tavira?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH TAW-rih DIH meh-NAH-zhayng DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo DIH tuh-VEE-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: Main defensive tower offering panoramic views.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao vigia da torre ou ao guarda de vigilância.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW vee-ZHEEUH DUH TAW-rih OHW OW GWAH-ruh-duh DIH vee-zhee-LAHNNGS-yuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the tower watchman or the security guard.

responses.english: Ask the tower watchman or the security guard.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW vee-ZHEEUH DUH TAW-rih OHW OW GWAH-ruh-duh DIH vee-zhee-LAHNNGS-yuh.
responses.local: Pergunte ao vigia da torre ou ao guarda de vigilância.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tourist info point is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o posto de informação turística?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW POHSH-too DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOWN too-REESH-tee-kuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Offers guided tour bookings and city maps.

likely_response.local: Pode perguntar na bilheteira da entrada principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih peh-ruh-goonng-TAHR NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DUH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: You can ask at the ticket office at the main entrance.

responses.english: You can ask at the ticket office at the main entrance.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih peh-ruh-goonng-TAHR NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DUH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL.
responses.local: Pode perguntar na bilheteira da entrada principal.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a loja de artesanato local?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AH LAW-zhuh DIH uh-ruh-tih-zuh-NAH-too loo-KAHL?

likely_response.local: Pergunte no Posto de informação turística, eles podem indicar o caminho.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NOO POHSH-too DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOWN too-REESH-tee-kuh, EH-lihsh PAW-dayng een-dee-KAHR AW kuh-MEE-nyoo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the Tourist Information Office, they can point you the way.

responses.english: Ask at the Tourist Information Office, they can point you the way.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NOO POHSH-too DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOWN too-REESH-tee-kuh, EH-lihsh PAW-dayng een-dee-KAHR AW kuh-MEE-nyoo.
responses.local: Pergunte no Posto de informação turística, eles podem indicar o caminho.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the public toilets are
phrases.cultural_note: Clean facilities maintained for visitor convenience.

likely_response.local: Os WC públicos estão na base do castelo.
likely_response.pronunciation: OOSH duhb-leeoo-SEH POOB-lee-koosh ihsh-TOWN NUH BAH-zih DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo.
likely_response.translation_en: The public toilets are at the base of the castle.

responses.english: The public toilets are at the base of the castle.
responses.phonetic: OOSH duhb-leeoo-SEH POOB-lee-koosh ihsh-TOWN NUH BAH-zih DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo.
responses.local: Os WC públicos estão na base do castelo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket office is
phrases.cultural_note: Buying tickets at the entrance is standard for most castles in Portugal.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, a bilheteira está na entrada principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh ehs-TAH NUH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, the ticket office is at the main entrance.

responses.english: Good morning, the ticket office is at the main entrance.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh ehs-TAH NUH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL.
responses.local: Bom dia, a bilheteira está na entrada principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tourist information is
phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o posto de informação turística?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-dee POH-soo en-kon-TRAR oo-POH-stoo djee-in-for-ma-SOWN too-REE-stee-kah?
phrases.cultural_note: Staff provides maps and local event schedules.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica junto à bilheteira.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is located next to the ticket office.

responses.english: Good morning, it is located next to the ticket office.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
responses.local: Bom dia, fica junto à bilheteira.

phrases.cultural_note: The bell fell from the tower and now rests at the base, a common sight in historic sites.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, o sino está caído na base.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, AW SEE-noo ehs-TAH KUHEE-doo NUH BAH-zih.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, the bell is fallen at the base.

responses.english: Good morning, the bell is fallen at the base.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, AW SEE-noo ehs-TAH KUHEE-doo NUH BAH-zih.
responses.local: Bom dia, o sino está caído na base.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the craft shop is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a loja de artesanato local?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH LAW-zhuh DIH uh-ruh-tih-zuh-NAH-too loo-KAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: Sells traditional Algarve ceramics and textiles.

likely_response.translation_en: Ask the staff at the ticket office.

responses.english: Ask the staff at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Capela de Santa Maria?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH kuh-PEH-luh DIH SAHNNG-tuh muh-REEUH?
phrases.cultural_note: Small Romanesque chapel with historical significance.

likely_response.local: Pergunte na bilheteira ou ao guia turístico local.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW OW GEEUH too-REESH-tee-koo loo-KAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the ticket office or the local tour guide.

responses.english: Ask at the ticket office or the local tour guide.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW OW GEEUH too-REESH-tee-koo loo-KAHL.
responses.local: Pergunte na bilheteira ou ao guia turístico local.
